arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen predicted XI v Brest: Victor Boniface out, Martin Terrier to start
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will be without Victor Boniface for their trip to face Stade Brestois in Brittany in the UEFA Champions League on Wednesday. The Nigeria international was involved in a…

arts.ttl: Brest predicted XI v Bayer Leverkusen: Pierre Lees-Melou to make first Champions League start
arts.sum: Having returned from an injury that had sidelined him since the end of last season, Pierre Lees-Melou is set to make his first-ever start in the UEFA Champions League proper. …

arts.ttl: Brest's 'magic' rise from amateur football to Champions League
arts.sum: Brest's rise from amateur football to the Champions League is "magic", but will they maintain a 100% start in Europe?

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag faces 'unhappy' boardroom as Xabi Alonso stance on job emerges
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag remains under intense pressure, with his Manchester United side now facing a crucial week, with matches in the Europa League, Premier League and Carabao Cup all upcoming

arts.ttl: Brest vs. Bayer Leverkusen: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Leverkusen have enjoyed a perfect start on their return to the Champions League and begin Matchday 3 as one of seven teams with two wins from two after beating Feyenoord and AC Milan, while also not conceding a single goal. Bayer Leverkusen put their 100 percent UEFA Champions League record on the line as they visit French debutants Brest, who are also still perfect, on Wednesday (kick-off: 6.45pm CEST).

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen’s Victor Boniface to miss Champions League clash against Brest following car accident
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen centre-forward Victor Boniface (23) did not travel to Brittany with the Bundesliga champions for their Champions League clash against Ligue 1 team Stade Brestois 29. The Nigeria international…

arts.ttl: Alonso explains decision to leave Boniface out of Leverkusen's squad to face Brest
arts.sum: Speaking at a press conference on Tuesday evening, Xabi Alonso confirmed that Victor Boniface will not be in his squad to face Brest - and explained why.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen ‘preparing’ for Xabi Alonso exit
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are reportedly making plans for life after Xabi Alonso with the young manager expected to join one of Europe’s biggest clubs next summer. The 42-year-old head coach was widely tipped to move on last summer after guiding the German outfit to a Bundesliga and German Cup double. Leverkusen lost just one match last […] The post Bayer Leverkusen ‘preparing’ for Xabi Alonso exit first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen boss: Boniface's availability against Brest "up in the air" after car crash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Simon Rolfes says it hasn't been decided yet if Victor Boniface will be part of the squad to face Stade Brest in the Champions League after the striker was involved in a car accident on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso stance on taking Man Utd job with Bayer Leverkusen preparing for exit
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso remains in high demand after his impressive start to life as Bayer Leverkusen manager, with a number of Premier League clubs showing an interest in the Spaniard
